attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SRC_REPORTED_REV_SRC_CD
,SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
,SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT
,DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG
,ACTIVE_FLG
,CRTD_TAGGING_RULE_PROCESS_NM
,UPD_TAGGING_RULE_PROCESS_NM
,SRC_REPORTED_QUOTE_NUM
,SRC_REPORTED_CONTRACT_NUM
,MATCHING_METHOD_FOR_TAGGING_NM
,SRC_REPORTED_SLS_ORD_HEADER_ID
,SRC_REPORTED_QUOTE_HEADER_ID
,DV_SPLIT_ALLOCATION_PCT
,SS_CODE
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
,'3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DTM
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$WORKDB.W_POS_TRX_LN_TO_SOL_LINK WPOS
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_TO_SOL_LINK_TV POS_LINK_TV 
  WHERE POS_LINK_TV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
    AND POS_LINK_TV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
)

SELECT
 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SRC_REPORTED_REV_SRC_CD
,SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
,SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT
,DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG
,ACTIVE_FLG
,CRTD_TAGGING_RULE_PROCESS_NM
,UPD_TAGGING_RULE_PROCESS_NM
,SRC_REPORTED_QUOTE_NUM
,SRC_REPORTED_CONTRACT_NUM
,MATCHING_METHOD_FOR_TAGGING_NM
,SRC_REPORTED_SLS_ORD_HEADER_ID
,SRC_REPORTED_QUOTE_HEADER_ID
,'1.00' AS DV_SPLIT_ALLOCATION_PCT
,SS_CODE
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$WORKDB.W_POS_TRX_LN_TO_SOL_LINK WPOS
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LN_TO_SOL_LINK NPOS_LINK 
  WHERE NPOS_LINK.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
    AND NPOS_LINK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WPOS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ORDER BY START_TV_DTM DESC, EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1
